text.title: Auto-Draft Postmortem, No Auto-Publish Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule id from content/01-core-rules.xml for inc-postmortem-auto-draft-no-publish.

decision-tree.root-question: Are incident artifacts structured enough to synthesise from?

example.trace: Incident inc-2026-05-12 closed at T → agent pulls Slack+PD+dashboards → emits draft at T+90min with 5 evidence links, 3 factor candidates, 2 action placeholders, `published=false` → human reviews, accepts 2 factors, assigns owners, sets `published=true`.
